topic: why Rust is taking over systems programming
hook: The why Rust is taking over systems programming dilemma.

script_segments.text: The why Rust is taking over systems programming dilemma.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing why Rust is taking over systems programming. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: I'm going right. Every time. But that's just me — comment yours.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: I wish someone told me this about why Rust is taking over systems programming sooner.
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
